ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policy_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy class */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Code representing the policy class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., auto, home, life) */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage options and limits */,
  "premium_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the premium (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "risk_category" TEXT /* Category of risk associated with the policy class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policy class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_data" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy class */,
  "earned_exposure" REAL /* Total earned exposure for the policy class */,
  "reported_loss" REAL /* Total reported loss for the policy class */,
  "current_relativity" REAL /* Current relativity of the policy class */,
  "olep" REAL /* Other Loss Exposure Potential (OLEP) for the policy class */,
  "number_of_claims" INTEGER /* Number of claims for the policy class */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was made */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "insured_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insured individual */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the claim data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the claim data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_data_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES policy_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_data_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy class */,
  "loss_ratio" REAL /* Loss ratio for the policy class */,
  "frequency_rate" REAL /* Frequency rate of claims for the policy class */,
  "severity_rate" REAL /* Severity rate of claims for the policy class */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Overall risk score for the policy class */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was conducted */,
  "assessment_period" TEXT /* Period over which the risk assessment was conducted (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the risk assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the risk assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES policy_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., theft, accident) */,
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claims adjuster handling the claim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the historical claim was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the historical claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_adjuster_id FOREIGN KEY ("adjuster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy class */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to the policy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "insured_name" TEXT /* Name of the insured */,
  "insured_address" TEXT /* Address of the insured */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Amount of the premium for the policy */,
  "insured_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insured individual */,
  "coverage_details" TEXT /* Detailed coverage options and limits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES policy_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., underwriter, claims adjuster, actuary, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., underwriting, claims, actuarial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., claims, risk assessment, performance) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* Period over which the report was generated (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Full name of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
